title: Treeman's herb
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Treemansherpic.jpg|thumb]]
'''Treeman's herb''' was a slow-growing shrub that was native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Extracts made from its leaves were used by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] as preservatives and medicine. The preservative quality of the herb was also used for [[Suspended animation/Legends|suspended animation]] processes. Harvested leaves, once the plant was established, regrew quite rapidly.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier|''Star Wars'' Episode I: ''The Gungan Frontier'']]
